refnamediv.refpurpose: Find minimum plateaus with a contrast threshold.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imextendedmin(image, depth); out = imextendedmin(image, depth, connectivity)

listitem.para: Nonnegative minimum contrast to a higher neighbor.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imextendedmin filters local minimum plateaus by their neighboring intensity contrast.

refsection.title: Examples
